title: The Harvest Men Main Trailer
prompt: Story: The Harvest Men (the-harvest-men) | Hook: A ritual mask selects a new wearer every dusk, and refusals vanish overnight. | Subgenre: folk horror | Tone: SLOW_BURN | Location: Isolated valley communes and threshing grounds | Villain: The Reaper Steward | Villain worldview: Communities survive only through chosen sacrifice. | Motifs: corn husk knots, lantern smoke, harvest blades. Build 18-second story trailer with hook in first 3 seconds, middle clue escalation, and final unresolved threat card.
negativePrompt: Avoid low frame-rate jitter, avoid compression artifacts, avoid incoherent camera cuts, avoid on-screen logos/watermarks.
